title: Gibberish
summary: Gibberish, also known as jibber-jabber, gobbledygook or "utter nonsense” is speech that is nonsense: ranging across speech sounds that are not actual words, pseudowords, language games, and specialized jargon that seems nonsensical to outsiders.
extract: Gibberish, also known as jibber-jabber, gobbledygook or "utter nonsense” is speech that is nonsense: ranging across speech sounds that are not actual words, pseudowords, language games, and specialized jargon that seems nonsensical to outsiders.
